name: The Agility
effect: Declare all existing processes Agile. This card is considered transformative.

clauses.name: DECLARATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the word Agile appears in a slide deck: All associated work is considered Agile.

clauses.name: CEREMONY OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If standups exceed forty-five minutes: They are considered Agile ceremonies.

clauses.name: FORGETFULNESS CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If anyone asks about the manifesto: The question is considered out of scope.
